query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A person with shoulder-length brown hair wearing a white short-sleeved top with pink trim and a dark skirt is suspended mid-air on a zip-line or swing apparatus with yellow handles and a metal chain, outdoors among green trees and brown earth.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with shoulder-length brown hair wearing a white short-sleeved top with pink trim and a dark skirt is suspended mid-air on a zip-line or swing apparatus with yellow handles and a metal chain, captured with strong motion blur streaking the background of green trees and brown earth, the frame tilted at an angle with casual composition giving the feel of a spontaneous snapshot.
